title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies
company: Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies:
Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies!
